projects.name: Marketing & Content
projects.description: Content creation, publishing, and marketing campaigns

projects.name: Tech / Software
projects.description: Software development, integrations, and technical projects

projects.name: Consulting / Services
projects.description: Client projects, service delivery, and consulting work

tasks.title: Weekly Client Check-in Call
tasks.description: Scheduled call with [Client Name] to discuss project progress and address any blockers

tasks.title: Blog Post: Q1 Industry Trends
tasks.description: Write and publish comprehensive blog post covering Q1 2026 tech and marketing trends. Target: 2000+ words, SEO optimized
tasks.notes: Use data from recent reports. Include 5+ credible sources

tasks.title: Monthly Analytics Report
tasks.description: Generate and distribute monthly performance reports covering: website traffic, lead conversions, content performance, client metrics
tasks.notes: Include YoY comparisons and actionable insights
tasks.automationSuggestion: ✅ Can be automated with scheduled cron task to generate + email reports monthly

tasks.title: Follow-up: Vendor Proposal Review
tasks.description: Review and respond to [Vendor Name]'s proposal for API integration. Negotiate terms if needed.

tasks.title: Client Onboarding Documentation
tasks.description: Create comprehensive onboarding guide and setup documentation for new consulting client

tasks.title: Social Media Content Calendar
tasks.description: Plan and schedule 4 weeks of social media content across LinkedIn, Twitter, and Instagram
tasks.notes: Mix promotional, educational, and engagement content (60/20/20 split)
tasks.automationSuggestion: ✅ Can be automated: once created, schedule publishing via Buffer/Later every month
